channel.title: ISC2 CISSP Course on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in ISC2 CISSP Course on simeononsecurity

item.title: ISC2 CISSP Course: Complete Study Guide for the CISSP Exam
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Cybersecurity Certification" , "Security Management" , "Security Architecture" , "Risk Management" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Security Operations" , "Network Security" , "Identity Management"
item.description: A comprehensive ISC2 CISSP study course covering all eight domains of the April 2024 exam outline: security and risk management, asset security, security architecture and engineering, communication and network security, IAM, security assessment and testing, security operations, and software development security.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Asset Security
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Asset Security" , "Data Classification" , "Data Protection" , "Data Lifecycle" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Data Governance" , "Privacy" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Asset Security for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn information classification, data roles, the data lifecycle, asset retention, data security controls, and data protection methods.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Communication and Network Security
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Network Security" , "Secure Architecture" , "Segmentation" , "Wireless Security" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Zero Trust" , "SDN" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Communication and Network Security for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn secure network architecture, segmentation, wireless and cellular networks, modern network concepts, and secure channels.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Identity and Access Management (IAM)
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Identity Management" , "Access Control" , "Authentication" , "Federation" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "RBAC" , "MFA" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Identity and Access Management for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn physical and logical access control, authentication strategy, federation, authorization models, and the identity lifecycle.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Security and Risk Management
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Security Management" , "Risk Management" , "Security Governance" , "Compliance" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Supply Chain Risk" , "Security Policy" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Security and Risk Management for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn professional ethics, security concepts, governance, compliance, risk management, supply chain risk, and awareness.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Security Architecture and Engineering
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Security Architecture" , "Security Engineering" , "Cryptography" , "Physical Security" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Security Models" , "Zero Trust" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Security Architecture and Engineering for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn secure design principles, security models, cryptographic solutions, cryptanalytic attacks, and physical security.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Security Assessment and Testing
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Security Assessment" , "Security Testing" , "Penetration Testing" , "Auditing" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Vulnerability Assessment" , "Compliance" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Security Assessment and Testing for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn assessment strategies, security control testing, collecting process data, and conducting security audits.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Security Operations
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Security Operations" , "Incident Management" , "Disaster Recovery" , "Digital Forensics" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Business Continuity" , "Monitoring" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Security Operations for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn investigations, logging and monitoring, configuration management, incident management, recovery, disaster recovery, and physical security.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Software Development Security
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Software Development Security" , "Secure SDLC" , "DevSecOps" , "Application Security" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Secure Coding" , "CI/CD" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Software Development Security for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn the secure SDLC, maturity models, security controls in development, assessing software security, and secure coding standards.
